recentPosts.caption:
Most marketing agencies figure it out as they go.

They run different plays for every client, hop between channels when something doesn't work, and rebuild strategy every quarter. Nothing compounds because nothing repeats.

GLV runs every client through the same five-step process. Every time.

One. Research the market. Who's actually searching. What competitors are ranking for. What's converting locally. We do this before we recommend a single tactic.

Two. Build the foundation in the right order. Site speed. On-page SEO. Google Business Profile. Email infrastructure. Tracking. You can't optimise what isn't built.

Three. Execute weekly. Content, links, ads, email, all running on a published cadence. Nothing waits for someone to feel inspired.

Four. Review what's moving. We pull the data every two weeks and route spend toward what's working.

Five. Let it compound. Six months of consistent execution beats six months of pivoting every two weeks.

Comment PROCESS below and I'll DM you the full step-by-step doc we walk every new client through.

Which of these steps do you think most agencies skip?

Most small business owners I talk to are paying three or four different marketing vendors.

A website person who built the site three years ago and disappears for months. An SEO contractor still optimising for keywords nobody searches anymore. A freelance ad person who can't see the email list. Maybe a content writer who's never actually read the website.

Each one bills you separately. Each one has their own theory of what's working. None of them coordinate.

This is the small-business marketing default in 2026 and it's the most expensive way to do it.

GLV runs the whole stack in one place. Local SEO. Websites. Email. Paid ads. AI integration. Six services. One team that actually knows how the pieces connect. One strategy that compounds month over month instead of pulling in five directions.

You save twice: the actual cost of three or four retainers, and the meeting time you'd spend trying to get vendors to align.

Comment SERVICES below and I'll DM you the six-service brief. What each service does, what results to expect, and how we connect them.

What does your current marketing setup look like?

GLV exists because small businesses across Northern Ontario keep losing leads they never knew about.

Wrong GBP categories. Outdated NAP citations. Zero local content. Invisible on Google Maps. Most of it isn't hard to fix. It's just what gets missed when nobody's looking at the full system.

We handle SEO, websites, email, paid ads, and AI integration for small and mid-size businesses across Northern Ontario and Canada. One team. One strategy.

Most agencies hand you outputs and disappear when the retainer ends. We build differently. Every piece of work is an asset that keeps earning past the billing cycle.

If you're a local business owner reading this and your Google Maps presence feels invisible, that's almost always fixable inside 90 days.

Comment AUDIT below and I'll DM you a free 15-minute Google Business Profile audit. You'll get exactly why you're not showing up and the three things to fix first.
